'''Chorh-dha''' was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] member of the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] criminal organization during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was a member of the [[Chattza clan/Legends|Chattza Clan]].
